name: Dark brotherhood contract - Jeela
description:
You have a contract to kill an Argonian. Seems he has pissed a lot of people of and now you have to kill him or maybe you can work something out with him something...intimate. Jeela has been stealing and robbing from the local racist nords and this caused a contract to be put on him.
____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
Male Pov only. The bot is very gay.
WIP the bot may change or get added to in the future. 
**Art by [@Tojoafterdark](https://twitter.com/Tojoafterdark)**
creator: Pootlavoti
